verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh Lord, I am very very Grateful For all you have done for me Oh Lord, I am very very Grateful I just want to thatnk you my Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I have a father who will never ever fail me I have a father who will never ever fail me Jesus is my father who will never ever fail me Rock of ages never ever fail me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Nina baba asiyeshindwa kamwe Nina baba asiyeshindwa kamwe Yesu ndiye baba asiyeshindwa kamwe mwamba imara asiyeshindwa kamwe
